calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Relief From Posting Bond Pursuant To Labor Code 98 2 - With Pos Attached
Off Calendar Oct-08-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Theresa Bichsel (415-703-4863; tbichsel@dir.ca.gov) for Respondent, Mr. Lopez.
Walter Lin (415-931-4207) of Law Offices of Michael Heath for Appellant/moving party Wilson Saul Gonzalez Villarta.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

APPELLANT WILSON GONZALEZ VILLARTA's Motion For Relief From Posting Bond Pursuant To Labor Code 98 2 is denied. (see word minutes for details.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
